name: Szechwan Spiced Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE ALL SAUCE INGREDIENTS AND SET ASIDE.
2. HEAT OIL IN A 4 TO 6 QUART POT OVER MEDIUM HEAT.
3. ADD GINGER, GARLIC (INCLUDING GREEN PART), AND SCALLIONS TO THE POT AND COOK FOR ABOUT 1-2 MINUTES UNTIL FRAGRANT.
4. ADD BEEF CHUNKS AND STIR TO COAT WITH OIL. COOK FOR ABOUT 5 MINUTES UNTIL MEAT LOSES ITS RED COLOR.
5. STIR IN ALL SAUCE COMPOSITION AND MIX WELL.
6. ADD WATER TO REACH A DEPTH OF ABOUT 2 CUPS OVER THE BEEF. COVER THE POT AND SIMMER ON LOW HEAT FOR ABOUT AN HOUR.
7. ADD REMAINING WATER AS NEEDED UNTIL THE BEVERAGE LEVEL IS APPROXIMATELY 1 1/2 CUPS WHEN THE BEEF IS DONE COOKING.
8. REMOVE FROM HEAT AND SERVE HOT.
